arts.ttl: Fiorentina's Bove conscious after on-field collapse
arts.sum: Fiorentina midfielder Edoardo Bove is conscious and responsive after spending the night in hospital having collapsed during Sunday's Serie A game against Inter Milan.

arts.ttl: Fiorentina's Bove 'awake and alert' after collapse vs Inter
arts.sum: Fiorentina have announced midfielder Edoardo Bove is awake and "alert" after being placed in a medically-induced coma following his collapse during a game on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Edoardo Bove's first words as Fiorentina star awake and responsive following collapse
arts.sum: The midfielder went down untouched in the 16th minute of Sunday night's Serie A clash between Fiorentina and Inter Milan

arts.ttl: Edoardo Bove ‘awake’ as Fiorentina issue update after collapsing during match
arts.sum: Fiorentina said the 22-year-old is awake in hospital and has spoken to his family and team-mates

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Fiorentina confirm Edoardo Bove awake and speaking after collapsing on pitch
arts.sum: Fiorentina's Edoardo Bove was rushed to hospital after collapsing during the first half of their Serie A clash with Inter Milan on Sunday, prompting the fixture to be abandoned

arts.ttl: Fiorentina's Bove awake after collapsing on pitch
arts.sum: Fiorentina midfielder Edoardo Bove is "awake" and "alert" after being admitted to intensive care in hospital on Sunday following his collapse on the pitch during his side's Serie A match against Inter Milan.
